6 ?70 0001010100 3

Constant
6 C 6 1111111111 a mismatch

6 I 7 0101000010 3 mismatch

6 I 0n 1011101001 6 mismatch

Binary 70
6 AND 70 0100000010 2 mismatch

6 OR 70 0101010110 5 mismatch

6 XOR 70 0001010100 3 match 1/1
all match XOR 70

6 0001010100 3
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 0101000010 partial 1011101001 6
left 6

6 I 0

Selected
0 I 1
1 I 2

6 XOR 70
7 I 1

Applying to 11000000
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 1 = 1
1 I 2 = 0
2 I 3 = 0
3 I 4 = 0
4 I 5 = 0
5 I 6 = 0
6 XOR 70 = XOR(I 7,I 0) = XOR(0,1) = 1
7 I 1 = 1

\boxed{10000011}
